skills.name: Clinical Report Generation
skills.description: Generates standardized clinical documents including discharge summaries, SOAP notes, consultation notes, and progress notes following medical documentation best practices.
skills.description_zh: 生成标准化临床文档，包括出院小结、SOAP 笔记、会诊记录和病程记录，遵循医疗文档最佳实践。

skills.name: Care Coordination
skills.description: Assists with care coordination tasks including patient triage, appointment scheduling, follow-up planning, and communication between healthcare providers.
skills.description_zh: 协助护理协调任务，包括患者分诊、预约安排、随访计划和医疗提供者之间的沟通。
